data.title: Web3 Summit Returns to Berlin to Champion Digital Freedom
data.description: On June 18 and 19, 2026, Berlin will host the Web3 Foundation's main event, convening builders, artists, researchers, and founders. The program will concentrate on privacy, self-sovereignty, and practical decentralized technology. The Web3 Summit, set in Berlin, will offer participants insight into cutting-edge developments and collaborations. The Summit continues to be a vital platform for exploring innovative concepts in the digital space.

data.title: Nxera Pharma’s QUVIVIQ® (daridorexant) 25mg and 50mg Receives Approval in Taiwan for the Treatment of Insomnia
data.description: In a recent announcement on 14 April 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. disclosed that its collaborator, Holling Bio-Pharma Corp., has been granted approval by the Taiwan Food and Drug Administration (TFDA) to commercialize QUVIVIQ® (daridorexant) in Taiwan. Marketed as 科唯可® film-coated tablets in Taiwan, this medication will be available in 25 and 50 mg doses specifically for adults suffering from insomnia. Nxera, listed as TSE 4565, anticipates the launch of QUVIVIQ® in the Taiwanese market within the year.

data.title: Telix Refinances Convertible Bonds
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited, based in Melbourne, Australia and Indianapolis, Indiana, has announced the launch of an offering of $550 million in convertible notes due 2031. These notes will be issued by Telix's wholly-owned subsidiary, Telix Pharmaceuticals. Telix is listed on the Australian Stock Exchange (ASX: TLX) and the NASDAQ (NASDAQ: TLX).

data.title: Noah Holdings and ARK Wealth Management Win Top Honors from Asian Private Banker and Euromoney, Highlighting Expertise in Connecting Chinese Wealth to Global Markets
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 14, 2026, Noah Holdings Limited (NYSE: NOAH, HKEX: 6686) and its ARK Wealth Management platform received prestigious awards from Asian Private Banker and Euromoney. The company was recognized with several top industry accolades for its exceptional performance in wealth management.
